case_title: STEPHEN CHEN VS. CVS PHARMACY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CVS PHARMACY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CVS PHARMACY, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CVS PHARMACY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT CVS PHARMACY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CVS PHARMACY, INC. $538.31 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $628.31, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT DEFENDANT'S CVS STORE THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: 500 CVS TOOTHBRUSHES - MADE IN CHINA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
